name: mept-english-trainer
description: MEPT English trainer web app with OpenAI-compatible question generation, audio listening practice, and answer checking.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/ai-client.js && node --check src/question-service.js && node --check src/check-service.js && node --check src/mept-format.js && node --check src/logger.js
